title: ctenitis cumingii
intro: Ctenitis cumingii, also known as the Cuming's fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Ctenitis cumingii is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and treating wounds. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are often used to create teas, infusions, and topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
